nasb.text: If anyone advocates a different doctrine and does not agree with sound words, those of our Lord Jesus Christ, and with the doctrine conforming to godliness,

esv.text: If anyone teaches a different doctrine and does not agree with the sound words of our Lord Jesus Christ and the teaching that accords with godliness,

cnv.text: 如果有人傳別的教義，不接受我們的主耶穌基督純正的話語，和那敬虔的道理，

ccb.text: 如果有人传的教义不符合我们主耶稣基督纯正的道和敬虔的教导，

csbs.text: 如果有人传讲别的教义，不符合我们主耶稣基督的健全话语以及那合乎敬神的教导，
